nasb.text: that Hadad fled to Egypt, he and certain Edomites of his father’s servants with him, while Hadad was a young boy.

esv.text: But Hadad fled to Egypt, together with certain Edomites of his father’s servants, Hadad still being a little child.

cnv.text: 哈達與他父親的幾個以東臣僕一起逃往埃及，那時哈達還是一個小孩子。

ccb.text: 那时，哈达年纪还小，他和他父亲的几个以东臣仆一起逃往埃及。
